# Port of etcd-raft's snapshot_succeed_via_app_resp.txt (regression test for
# https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/pull/10308).
#
# A snapshot whose index equals the leader's last index used to leave the
# follower stuck in Probing state after receiving and applying the snapshot,
# because the MsgAppResp from the follower (with index = snapshot.index) hit
# the path that didn't transition Probe → Replicate. The fix is the
# `pr.maybeUpdate(m.getIndex())` branch in stepLeader's MsgAppendResponse
# handler that also covers the "match already equals m.getIndex()" case.
#
# We exercise this here by:
# 1. Bootstrap a cluster of {1, 2} with the conf state declaring 3 voters.
# 2. Stabilize so leader 1 has commit = lastIndex.
# 3. Take a snapshot at that exact index and compact.
# 4. Add the missing node 3.
# 5. Stabilize — node 3 should receive a snapshot and end up in StateReplicate,
#    NOT stuck in StateProbe.

# Bring up two of the three nodes; the third (id=3) starts later.
add-nodes id=1,2 voters=1,2,3
----
INFO 1 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 1 became follower at term 0
INFO 2 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 2 became follower at term 0

campaign id=1
----
INFO 1 is starting a new election
INFO 1 became StateCandidate at term 1

stabilize
----
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateCandidate term=1 commit=0
> 2 receiving MsgRequestVote from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 1 receiving MsgRequestVoteResponse from 2
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=0
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=1
> 2 receiving MsgAppend from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=1
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 2

status id=1
----
id=1 state=StateLeader term=1 lead=1 commit=1 lastIndex=1

# Take a snapshot at the leader's current last index and compact.
create-snapshot id=1 index=1
----
snapshot index=1 term=1

compact id=1 index=1
----
compacted to index=1

log-state id=1
----
id=1 firstIndex=2 lastIndex=1 committed=1 applied=1

# Add the missing node 3, fresh log.
add-nodes id=3 voters=1,2,3
----
INFO 3 switched to configuration voters=(1 2 3)
INFO 3 became follower at term 0

# Tick the leader so it sends a heartbeat. The heartbeat → HeartbeatResp →
# bcastAppend cycle is what discovers a newly-reachable follower and routes
# the snapshot (the leader can't know to send a snapshot until it gets ANY
# response from node 3 indicating its true match index).
tick id=1
----
ok

# Stabilize; node 3 must receive the snapshot and end up replicating.
stabilize
----
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=1
> 2 receiving MsgHeartbeat from 1
> 2 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=1
> 3 receiving MsgHeartbeat from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=0
> 1 receiving MsgHeartbeatResponse from 2
> 1 receiving MsgHeartbeatResponse from 3
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=1
> 3 receiving MsgSnapshot from 1
> 3 handling Ready: state=StateFollower term=1 commit=1
> 1 receiving MsgAppendResponse from 3

# CRITICAL: node 3 must be StateReplicate, not stuck in StateProbe. This is
# the etcd#10308 regression check.
progress id=1
----
1: StateReplicate match=1 next=2
2: StateReplicate match=1 next=2
3: StateReplicate match=1 next=2

status id=3
----
id=3 state=StateFollower term=1 lead=1 commit=1 lastIndex=1
